title: Delete objects
excerpt: description: Delete individual objects or folders from an R2 bucket. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. You can delete objects from R2 using the dashboard, Workers API, S3 API, or command-line tools. To empty or delete an entire bucket, refer to [Delete buckets](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/buckets/delete-buckets/). 1. In the Cloudflare dashboard, go to the **R2 object storage** page.
